description_long: This object is a plump, orange pumpkin with a matte surface and a slightly irregular, natural shape. A whimsical black cauldron with large, white cartoon eyes and a brown, wavy-edged lid sits partially inside a carved opening at the top of the pumpkin. The pumpkin's stem is thick, brown, and slightly curved, attached to the cauldron lid, giving the impression that the cauldron is emerging from or hiding within the pumpkin. The pumpkin's surface is smooth with subtle ridges, and the opening is large enough to reveal the cauldron's face and part of its body. There are no visible facial carvings or traditional jack-o'-lantern features on the pumpkin itself.
description: A round, orange pumpkin with a brown stem and a cartoonish black cauldron with eyes peeking out from a carved opening at the top. The pumpkin has a smooth, matte finish and no facial carvings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pumpkin with a large opening at the top, from which a black cauldron with eyes and a brown lid is peeking out.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cauldron's face and the depth of the pumpkin's opening, with the cauldron's features more visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing mostly the pumpkin's back and the brown stem, with only a small part of the cauldron visible.
description_view_3: Angled rear view showing the cauldron's face partially visible and the pumpkin's ridged surface.
